terms: I acknowledge that SwanyThree platform features (Paywalls, Subscriptions) carry a 10% service fee. Direct tips via CashApp, Zelle, and Venmo are fee-free.
I agree to not stream copyrighted content during Watch Parties. Only embeddable sources (YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, SoundCloud, Twitch) are permitted.
I understand Guest Destinations require my own platform stream keys and that I must confirm I am not violating platform exclusivity agreements (e.g., Twitch Affiliate/Partner).
I accept that this is a beta product and may contain bugs or incomplete features.
I agree to report any issues or security vulnerabilities to the SwanyThree team.
I understand that creators hosting private or paid panels must complete identity verification via Stripe Identity before going live.
I acknowledge that private streams are NOT end-to-end encrypted and that SwanyThree retains admin access for legal compliance and content moderation purposes.
I agree that all AI-generated content (avatars, voice cloning) will be watermarked as synthetic media and that voice cloning requires live voice verification to prove ownership.
I understand that I am solely responsible for reporting income from direct tips (CashApp, Zelle, Venmo) for tax purposes. Platform transactions via Stripe are reported via 1099-K.

revenue_policy.platform_transactions: 10% service fee on Paywalls and Subscriptions processed via Stripe Connect. Tax reporting (1099-K) handled automatically.
revenue_policy.direct_tips: CashApp, Zelle, and Venmo tips are fee-free and go directly to the creator. Creators are solely responsible for reporting this income.

privacy.camera_mic: Camera/Mic access is local-only via WebRTC until 'Go Live' is pressed.
privacy.viewer_location: Viewer locations are fuzzed to Country/State level only. Precise coordinates, city names, and IP addresses are never displayed or stored.
privacy.stream_keys: Third-party stream keys are encrypted via AES-256-GCM (Vault Pro) and are never exposed to frontend APIs or other users.

content_safety.id_verification: Creators hosting private or paid panels must verify their identity via Stripe Identity (government ID + selfie match).
content_safety.moderation: SwanyThree retains admin access to all streams (including private panels) for legal compliance. NCMEC hash-matching is active for uploaded content.
content_safety.ai_content: All AI-generated video/audio is watermarked (visible and invisible). Voice cloning requires live voice consent verification.

beta_agreement_v2.data_retention: Stream recordings are kept for 30 days unless the creator opts for permanent storage. Content safety snapshots are retained for legal compliance.
beta_limitations: Watch Party supports YouTube, Vimeo, Dailymotion, SoundCloud, and Twitch embeds only (no direct file uploads)
Guest Destinations support RTMP-compatible platforms only
Multistreaming requires compliance acknowledgment regarding platform exclusivity agreements
